closure_text: Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 34; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-646 updated accordingly.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Containment isolated 8 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Containment isolated 38 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
